{\n101\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Error() = %q, want %q\", err.Error(), tt.expected)\n102\t\t\t\t}\n103\t\t\t})\n104\t\t}\n105\t}\n106\t\n107\t// TestParseErrorWithExpectedActual demonstrates ParseError with output:\n112\t//\n113\t//\tparse error in schema.yaml at line 7, column 12: type mismatch (expected: string, actual: integer)\n114\tfunc TestParseErrorWithExpectedActual(t *testing.T) {\n115\t\terr := NewParseError(\"schema.yaml\", \"type mismatch\", 7, 12, ErrCodeTypeMismatch, \"string\", \"integer\")\n116\t\n117\t\texpected := \"parse error in schema.yaml at line 7, column 12: type mismatch (expected: string, actual: integer)\"\n118\t\tif err.Error() != expected {\n119\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Error() = %q, want %q\", err.Error(), expected)\n120\t\t}\n121\t\n122\t\terrorMsg := err.Error()\n123\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"expected: string\") {\n124\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include expected type\")\n125\t\t}\n126\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"actual: integer\") {\n127\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include actual type\")\n128\t\t}\n129\t}\n130\t\n131\t// TestParseErrorAllErrorCodes documents all error code formats\n132\tfunc TestParseErrorAllErrorCodes(t *testing.T) {\n133\t\ttests := []struct {\n134\t\t\tname         string\n135\t\t\tcode         ErrorCode\n136\t\t\texpectedType ErrorType\n137\t\t}{\n138\t\t\t{\n139\t\t\t\tname:         \"invalid syntax error\",\n140\t\t\t\tcode:         ErrCodeInvalidSyntax,\n141\t\t\t\texpectedType: ErrorTypeParse,\n142\t\t\t},\n143\t\t\t{\n144\t\t\t\tname:         \"type mismatch error\",\n145\t\t\t\tcode:         ErrCodeTypeMismatch,\n146\t\t\t\texpectedType: ErrorTypeParse,\n147\t\t\t},\n148\t\t\t{\n149\t\t\t\tname:         \"required field error\",\n150\t\t\t\tcode:         ErrCodeRequiredField,\n151\t\t\t\texpectedType: ErrorTypeParse,\n152\t\t\t},\n153\t\t\t{\n154\t\t\t\tname:         \"invalid value error\",\n155\t\t\t\tcode:         ErrCodeInvalidValue,\n156\t\t\t\texpectedType: ErrorTypeParse,\n157\t\t\t},\n158\t\t\t{\n159\t\t\t\tname:         \"invalid structure error\",\n160\t\t\t\tcode:         ErrCodeInvalidStructure,\n161\t\t\t\texpectedType: ErrorTypeParse,\n162\t\t\t},\n163\t\t\t{\n164\t\t\t\tname:         \"constraint violation error\",\n165\t\t\t\tcode:         ErrCodeConstraintViolation,\n166\t\t\t\texpectedType: ErrorTypeParse,\n167\t\t\t},\n168\t\t}\n169\t\n170\t\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n171\t\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n172\t\t\t\terr := NewParseError(\"test.yaml\", \"test message\", 1, 1, tt.code, \"\", \"\")\n173\t\t\t\tif err.Code() != tt.code {\n174\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Code() = %q, want %q\", err.Code(), tt.code)\n175\t\t\t\t}\n176\t\t\t\tif err.YAMLErrorType() != tt.expectedType {\n177\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"YAMLErrorType() = %q, want %q\", err.YAMLErrorType(), tt.expectedType)\n178\t\t\t\t}\n179\t\t\t})\n180\t\t}\n181\t}\n182\t\n183\t// ============================================================================\n184\t// Section 2: ValidationError with field paths\n185\t// ============================================================================\n186\t\n187\t// TestValidationErrorWithFieldPath demonstrates ValidationError format with field path\n188\t//\n189\t// Format: \"validation error in <file> at field <field-path>: <message> (constraint: <constraint>)\"\n190\t//\n191\t// Example output:\n192\t//\n193\t//\tvalidation error in config.yaml at field server.port: port must be between 1 and 65535 (constraint: must be between 1-65535)\n194\tfunc TestValidationErrorWithFieldPath(t *testing.T) {\n195\t\terr := NewValidationError(\"config.yaml\", \"port must be between 1 and 65535\", \"server.port\", \"must be between 1-65535\", ErrCodeInvalidValue, 0, 0, \"\", \"server.port\")\n196\t\n197\t\texpected := \"validation error in config.yaml at field server.port: port must be between 1 and 65535 (constraint: must be between 1-65535)\"\n198\t\tif err.Error() != expected {\n199\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Error() = %q, want %q\", err.Error(), expected)\n200\t\t}\n201\t\n202\t\terrorMsg := err.Error()\n203\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"validation error in\") {\n204\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include error type\")\n205\t\t}\n206\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"at field server.port\") {\n207\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include field path\")\n208\t\t}\n209\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"port must be between 1 and 65535\") {\n210\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include message\")\n211\t\t}\n212\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"constraint: must be between 1-65535\") {\n213\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include constraint\")\n214\t\t}\n215\t}\n216\t\n217\t// TestValidationErrorNestedFieldPaths documents ValidationError with various field path formats\n218\t//\n219\t// Field paths can be:\n220\t// - Simple: \"server.port\"\n221\t// - Nested: \"database.connectionPool.maxConnections\"\n222\t// - Array access: \"servers.api.responses[0].statusCode\"\n223\tfunc TestValidationErrorNestedFieldPaths(t *testing.T) {\n224\t\ttestCases := []struct {\n225\t\t\tname      string\n226\t\t\tfieldPath string\n227\t\t\tmessage   string\n228\t\t\tconstraint string\n229\t\t}{\n230\t\t\t{\n231\t\t\t\tname:      \"simple dot-notation path\",\n232\t\t\t\tfieldPath: \"server.port\",\n233\t\t\t\tmessage:   \"port out of range\",\n234\t\t\t\tconstraint: \"must be between 1-65535\",\n235\t\t\t},\n236\t\t\t{\n237\t\t\t\tname:      \"nested dot-notation path\",\n238\t\t\t\tfieldPath: \"database.connectionPool.maxConnections\",\n239\t\t\t\tmessage:   \"too many connections\",\n240\t\t\t\tconstraint: \"must be between 1-100\",\n241\t\t\t},\n242\t\t\t{\n243\t\t\t\tname:      \"array access path\",\n244\t\t\t\tfieldPath: \"servers.api.responses[0].statusCode\",\n245\t\t\t\tmessage:   \"invalid status code\",\n246\t\t\t\tconstraint: \"must be between 100-599\",\n247\t\t\t},\n248\t\t\t{\n249\t\t\t\tname:      \"deep kubernetes-style path\",\n250\t\t\t\tfieldPath: \"spec.template.spec.containers[0].image\",\n251\t\t\t\tmessage:   \"invalid image tag\",\n252\t\t\t\tconstraint: \"must match registry/*:tag pattern\",\n253\t\t\t},\n254\t\t}\n255\t\n256\t\tfor _, tt := range testCases {\n257\t\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n258\t\t\t\terr := NewValidationError(\"config.yaml\", tt.message, tt.fieldPath, tt.constraint, ErrCodeConstraintViolation, 0, 0, \"\", tt.fieldPath)\n259\t\n260\t\t\t\terrorMsg := err.Error()\n261\t\n262\t\t\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, tt.fieldPath) {\n263\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Should include field path '%s'\", tt.fieldPath)\n264\t\t\t\t}\n265\t\t\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, tt.message) {\n266\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Should include message '%s'\", tt.message)\n267\t\t\t\t}\n268\t\t\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, tt.constraint) {\n269\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Should include constraint '%s'\", tt.constraint)\n270\t\t\t\t}\n271\t\t\t})\n272\t\t}\n273\t}\n274\t\n275\t// TestValidationErrorWithLineAndColumn demonstrates ValidationError with position information\n276\t//\n277\t// Format: \"validation error in <file> at line <line>, column <column> at field <field-path>: <message> (constraint: <constraint>)\"\n278\t//\n279\t// Example output:\n280\t//\n281\t//\tvalidation error in %q, want %q\", err.Error(), expected)\n288\t\t}\n289\t\n290\t\terrorMsg := err.Error()\n291\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"at line 15, column 12\") {\n292\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include line and column\")\n293\t\t}\n294\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"at field server.port\") {\n295\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include field path\")\n296\t\t}\n297\t}\n298\t\n299\t// TestValidationErrorWithoutFieldPath demonstrates ValidationError without field path\n300\t//\n301\t// Format: \"validation error in <file>: <message>\"\n302\t//\n303\t// Example output:\n304\t//\n305\t//\tvalidation error in config.yaml: validation failed\n306\tfunc TestValidationErrorWithoutFieldPath(t *testing.T) {\n307\t\terr := NewValidationError(\"config.yaml\", \"validation failed\", \"\", \"\", {\n311\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Error() = %q, want %q\", err.Error(), expected)\n312\t\t}\n313\t\n314\t\terrorMsg := err.Error()\n315\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"validation error in\") {\n316\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include error type\")\n317\t\t}\n318\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"validation failed\") {\n319\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include message\")\n320\t\t}\n321\t}\n322\t\n323\t// TestValidationErrorComplete demonstrates complete ValidationError with all components\n324\t//\n325\t// Format breakdown:\n326\t// - Location: \"<file>:<line>:<column>\" or \"<file>\"\n327\t// - Error type: \"validation error in\"\n328\t// - Field path: \"at field <field-path>\"\n329\t// - Message: The specific validation failure\n330\t// - Constraint: \"(constraint: <details>)\"\n331\t//\n332\t// Example:\n333\t//\n334\t//\tvalidation error in deployment.yaml at line 22, column 18 at field spec.template.spec.containers[0].image: invalid image tag (constraint: must match registry/*:tag pattern)\n335\tfunc TestValidationErrorComplete(t *testing.T) {\n336\t\terr := NewValidationError(\"deployment.yaml\", \"invalid image tag\", \"spec.template.spec.containers[0].image\", \"must match components\n341\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"deployment.yaml\") {\n342\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include file path\")\n343\t\t}\n344\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"at line 22, column 18\") {\n345\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include line and column\")\n346\t\t}\n347\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"at field spec.template.spec.containers[0].image\") {\n348\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include field pattern\") {\n354\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include constraint\")\n355\t\t}\n356\t}\n357\t\n358\t// ============================================================================\n359\t// Section 3: Type mismatch errors\n360\t// ============================================================================\n361\t\n362\t// TestTypeMismatchErrorFormat demonstrates type mismatch error format\n363\t//\n364\t// Format: \"type mismatch in <file> at line <line>, field <field-path>: expected <expected>, got <actual>\"\n365\t//\n366\t// Example output:\n367\t//\n368\t//\ttype mismatch in config.yaml at line 8, field server.port: expected integer, got string\n369\tfunc TestTypeMismatchErrorFormat(t *testing.T) {\n370\t\terr := NewTypeMismatchError(\n371\t\t\t\"config.yaml\",\n372\t\t\t\"server.port\",\n373\t\t\t\"integer\",\n374\t\t\t\"string\",\n375\t\t\t\"8080\",\n376\t\t\t8,\n377\t\t\t\"\",\n378\t\t)\n379\t\n380\t\texpected := \"type mismatch in config.yaml at line 8, field server.port: expected integer, got string\"\n381\t\tif err.Error() != expected {\n382\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Error() = %q, want %q\", err.Error(), expected)\n383\t\t}\n384\t\n385\t\t// Verify format\n386\t\terrorMsg := err.Error()\n387\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"type mismatch in\") {\n388\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include error type\")\n389\t\t}\n390\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"config.yaml\") {\n391\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include file path\")\n392\t\t}\n393\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"at line 8\") {\n394\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include line number\")\n395\t\t}\n396\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"field server.port\") {\n397\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include field path\")\n398\t\t}\n399\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"expected integer\") {\n400\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include expected type\")\n401\t\t}\n402\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"got string\") {\n403\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include actual type\")\n404\t\t}\n405\t\n406\t\t// Verify Context() method\n407\t\tctxMsg := err.Context()\n408\t\texpectedCtx := \"field: server.port, expected type: integer, actual type: string, value: 8080\"\n409\t\tif ctxMsg != expectedCtx {\n410\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Context() = %q, want %q\", ctxMsg, expectedCtx)\n411\t\t}\n412\t}\n413\t\n414\t// TestTypeMismatchVariousTypes documents type mismatch errors for various type combinations\n415\t//\n416\t// Common type mismatches:\n417\t// - Expected integer, got string\n418\t// - Expected string, got integer\n419\t// - Expected boolean, got string\n420\t// - Expected array, got scalar\n421\t// - Expected object, got null\n422\tfunc TestTypeMismatchVariousTypes(t *testing.T) {\n423\t\ttestCases := []struct {\n424\t\t\tname         string\n425\t\t\tfieldPath    string\n426\t\t\texpectedType string\n427\t\t\tactualType   string\n428\t\t\tvalue        string\n429\t\t}{\n430\t\t\t{\n431\t\t\t\tname:         \"integer expected, string got\",\n432\t\t\t\tfieldPath:    \"port\",\n433\t\t\t\texpectedType: \"integer\",\n434\t\t\t\tactualType:   \"string\",\n435\t\t\t\tvalue:        \"8080\",\n436\t\t\t},\n437\t\t\t{\n438\t\t\t\tname:         \"integer expected, boolean got\",\n439\t\t\t\tfieldPath:    \"timeout\",\n440\t\t\t\texpectedType: \"integer\",\n441\t\t\t\tactualType:   \"boolean\",\n442\t\t\t\tvalue:        \"true\",\n443\t\t\t},\n444\t\t\t{\n445\t\t\t\tname:         \"boolean expected, string got\",\n446\t\t\t\tfieldPath:    \"enabled\",\n447\t\t\t\texpectedType: \"boolean\",\n448\t\t\t\tactualType:   \"string\",\n449\t\t\t\tvalue:        \"yes\",\n450\t\t\t},\n451\t\t\t{\n452\t\t\t\tname:         \"array expected, string got\",\n453\t\t\t\tfieldPath:    \"hosts\",\n454\t\t\t\texpectedType: \"array\",\n455\t\t\t\tactualType:   \"string\",\n456\t\t\t\tvalue:        \"localhost\",\n457\t\t\t},\n458\t\t\t{\n459\t\t\t\tname:         \"object expected, null got\",\n460\t\t\t\tfieldPath:    \"config\",\n461\t\t\t\texpectedType: \"object\",\n462\t\t\t\tactualType:   \"null\",\n463\t\t\t\tvalue:        \"null\",\n464\t\t\t},\n465\t\t}\n466\t\n467\t\tfor _, tt := range testCases {\n468\t\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n469\t\t\t\terr := &TypeMismatchError{\n470\t\t\t\t\tFilePath:     \"config.yaml\",\n471\t\t\t\t\tFieldPath:    tt.fieldPath,\n472\t\t\t\t\tExpectedType: tt.expectedType,\n473\t\t\t\t\tActualType:   tt.actualType,\n474\t\t\t\t\tValue:        tt.value,\n475\t\t\t\t\tLine:         10,\n476\t\t\t\t}\n477\t\n478\t\t\t\terrorMsg := err.Error()\n479\t\n480\t\t\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, tt.fieldPath) {\n481\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Should include field path '%s'\", tt.fieldPath)\n482\t\t\t\t}\n483\t\t\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, tt.expectedType) {\n484\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Should include expected type '%s'\", tt.expectedType)\n485\t\t\t\t}\n486\t\t\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, tt.actualType) {\n487\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Should include actual type '%s'\", tt.actualType)\n488\t\t\t\t}\n489\t\n490\t\t\t\t// Verify error type\n491\t\t\t\tif err.YAMLErrorType() != ErrorTypeTypeMismatch {\n492\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"YAMLErrorType() = %q, want %q\", err.YAMLErrorType(), ErrorTypeTypeMismatch)\n493\t\t\t\t}\n494\t\n495\t\t\t\t// Verify error code\n496\t\t\t\tif err.Code() != ErrCodeTypeMismatch {\n497\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Code() = %q, want %q\", err.Code(), ErrCodeTypeMismatch)\n498\t\t\t\t}\n499\t\t\t})\n500\t\t}\n501\t}\n502\t\n503\t// TestTypeMismatchNestedFields demonstrates type mismatch in nested field paths\n504\t//\n505\t// Example:\n506\t//\n507\t//\ttype mismatch in app.yaml at line 35, field servers.api.responses[0].statusCode: expected integer, got string\n508\tfunc TestTypeMismatchNestedFields(t *testing.T) {\n509\t\terr := &TypeMismatchError{\n510\t\t\tFilePath:     \"app.yaml\",\n511\t\t\tFieldPath:    \"servers.api.responses[0].statusCode\",\n512\t\t\tExpectedType: \"integer\",\n513\t\t\tActualType:   \"string\",\n514\t\t\tValue:        \"\\\"200\\\"\",\n515\t\t\tLine:         35,\n516\t\t}\n517\t\n518\t\terrorMsg := err.Error()\n519\t\n520\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"app.yaml\") {\n521\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include file include type information\")\n531\t\t}\n532\t\n533\t\t// Verify context\n534\t\tctxMsg := err.Context()\n535\t\tif !contains(ctxMsg, \"field: servers.api.responses[0].statusCode\") {\n536\t\t\tt.Error(\"Context should include field path\")\n537\t\t}\n538\t\tif !contains(ctxMsg, \"expected type: integer\") {\n539\t\t\tt.Error(\"Context should include expected type\")\n540\t\t}\n541\t\tif !contains(ctxMsg, \"actual type: string\") {\n542\t\t\tt.Error(\"Context should include actual type\")\n543\t\t}\n544\t}\n545\t\n546\t// TestTypeMismatchWithoutLine output:\n551\t//\n552\t//\ttype mismatch in data.yaml, field database.timeout: expected integer, got boolean\n553\tfunc TestTypeMismatchWithoutLine(t *testing.T) {\n554\t\terr := &TypeMismatchError{\n555\t\t\tFilePath:     \"data.yaml\",\n556\t\t\tFieldPath:    \"database.timeout\",\n557\t\t\tExpectedType: \"integer\",\n558\t\t\tActualType:   \"boolean\",\n559\t\t\tValue: ============================================================================\n581\t// Section 4: Real-world error scenarios\n582\t// ============================================================================\n583\t\n584\t// TestRealWorldConfigFileError demonstrates a realistic configuration file error scenario\n585\t//\n586\t// Scenario: Invalid port configuration in service config\n587\t//\n588\t// config.yaml:\n589\t//\n590\t//\tservices:\n591\t//\t  - name: web\n592\t//\t    port: \"8080\"  # ERROR: should be integer, not string\n593\t//\n594\t// Error output:\n595\t//\n596\t//\ttype mismatch in config.yaml at line 5, field services[0].port: expected integer, got string\n597\tfunc TestRealWorldConfigFileError(t *testing.T) {\n598\t\terr := &TypeMismatchError{\n599\t\t\tFilePath:     \"config.yaml\",\n600\t\t\tFieldPath:    \"services[0].port\",\n601\t\t\tExpectedType: \"integer\",\n602\t\t\tActualType:   \"string\",\n603\t\t\tValue:        \"\\\"8080\\\"\",\n604\t\t\tLine:         5,\n605\t\t}\n606\t\n607\t\terrorMsg := err.Error()\n608\t\n609\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"config.yaml\") {\n610\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include file path\")\n611\t\t}\n612\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"at line 5\") {\n613\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include line number\")\n614\t\t}\n615\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"field services[0].port\") {\n616\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include field with array index\")\n617\t\t}\n618\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"expected integer, got string\") {\n619\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include type mismatch\")\n620\t\t}\n621\t}\n622\t\n623\t// TestRealWorldValidationError demonstrates a realistic validation error scenario\n624\t//\n625\t// Scenario: Port number out of valid range\n626\t//\n627\t// config.yaml:\n628\t//\n629\t//\tserver:\n630\t//\t  port: 70000  # ERROR: out of range (1-65535)\n631\t//\n632\t// Error output:\n633\t//\n634\t//\tconstraint violation in Consistency rules:\n723\t// 1. Package yamlutil test file documenting error message formats\n//\n// This test file demonstrates and verifies all error message formats across the ARMOR codebase.\n// It serves as both test coverage and documentation for how errors are formatted and displayed.\n//\n// Error Message Format Categories\n//\n// 1. ParseError with line:column\n//    - Format: \"parse error in <file> at line <line>, column <column>: <message>\"\n//    - Example: \"parse error in config.yaml at line 10, column 5: missing colon\"\n//\n// 2. ValidationError with field paths\n//    - Format: \"validation error in <file> at line <line>, column <column> at field <field-path>: <message> (constraint: <constraint>)\"\n//    - Example: \"validation error in config.yaml at line 15, column 12 at field server.port: port must be between 1 and 65535 (constraint: must be between 1-65535)\"\n//\n// 3. Type mismatch errors\n//    - Format: \"type mismatch in <file> at line <line>, field <field-path>: expected <expected>, got <actual>\"\n//    - Example: \"type mismatch in config.yaml at line 8, field server.port: expected integer, got string\"\n\npackage yamlutil\n\nimport (\n\t\"testing\"\n)\n\n// ============================================================================\n// Section 1: ParseError with line:column\n// ============================================================================\n\n// TestParseErrorLineColumnFullFormat demonstrates complete ParseError format with all location components\n//\n// Format: \"parse error in <file> at line <line>, column <column>: <message>\"\n//\n// Example output:\n//\n//\tparse error in config.yaml at line 10, column 5: missing colon\nfunc TestParseErrorLineColumnFullFormat(t *testing.T) {\n\terr := NewParseError(\"config.yaml\", \"missing colon\", 10, 5, ErrCodeInvalidSyntax, \"\", \"\")\n\n\texpected := \"parse error in config.yaml at line 10, column 5: missing colon\"\n\tif err.Error() != expected {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"Error() = %q, want %q\", err.Error(), expected)\n\t}\n\n\t// Verify format components\n\terrorMsg := err.Error()\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"config.yaml\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include file path\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"at line 10\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include line number\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"column 5\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include column number\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"missing colon\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include error message\")\n\t}\n}\n\n// TestParseErrorLineColumnVariations documents different location formatting scenarios\nfunc TestParseErrorLineColumnVariations(t *testing.T) {\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname \"config.yaml\",\n\t\t\tmessage:  \"test\",\n\t\t\tline:     10,\n\t\t\tcolumn:   5,\n\t\t\texpected: \"parse error in config.yaml at line 10, column 5: test\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:     \"file test\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:     \"file only\",\n\t\t\tfilePath: \"config.yaml\",\n\t\t\tmessage:  \"test\",\n\t\t\tline:     0,\n\t\t\tcolumn:   0,\n\t\t\texpected: \"parse error in config.yaml: test\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\terr := NewParseError(tt.filePath, tt.message, tt.line, tt.column, \"\", \"\", error in schema.yaml at line 7, column 12: type mismatch (expected: string, actual: integer)\nfunc TestParseErrorWithExpectedActual(t *testing.T) {\n\terr := NewParseError(\"schema.yaml\", \"type mismatch\", 7, 12, ErrCodeTypeMismatch, \"string\", \"integer\")\n\n\texpected := \"parse error in schema.yaml at line 7, column 12: type mismatch (expected: string, actual: integer)\"\n\tif err.Error() != expected {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"Error() = %q, want %q\", err.Error(), expected)\n\t}\n\n\terrorMsg := err.Error()\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"expected: string\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should   \"too many connections\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: \"must be between 1-100\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"array access path\",\n\t\t\tfieldPath: \"servers.api.responses[0].statusCode\",\n\t\t\tmessage:   \"invalid status code\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: \"must be between 100-599\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"deep kubernetes-style path\",\n\t\t\tfieldPath: \"spec.template.spec.containers[0].image\",\n\t\t\tmessage:   \"invalid image tag\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: \"must match registry/*:tag pattern\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\terr := NewValidationError(\"config.yaml\", tt.message, tt.fieldPath, tt.constraint, ErrCodeConstraintViolation, 0, 0, \"\", tt.fieldPath)\n\n\t\t\terrorMsg := err.Error()\n\n\t\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, tt.fieldPath) {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Should include field path '%s'\", tt.fieldPath)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, tt.message) {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Should include message '%s'\", tt.message)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, tt.constraint) {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Should include constraint '%s'\", tt.constraint)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\n// TestValidationErrorWithLineAndColumn demonstrates ValidationError with position information\n//\n// Format: \"validation error in <file> at line <line>, column <column> at field <field-path>: <message> (constraint: <constraint>)\"\n//\n// Example output:\n//\n//\tvalidation error in app.yaml at line 15, column 12 at field server.port: port out of range (constraint: must be between 1-65535)\nfunc TestValidationErrorWithLineAndColumn(t *testing.T) {\n\terr := NewValidationError(\"app.yaml\", \"port out of range\", \"server.port\", \"must be between 1-65535\", ErrCodeInvalidValue, 15, 12, ErrorTypeValidation, \"server.port\")\n\n\texpected := \"validation error in app.yaml at line 15, column 12 at field server.port: port out of range (constraint: must be between 1-65535)\"\n\tif err.Error() != expected {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"Error() = %q, want %q\", err.Error(), expected)\n\t}\n\n\terrorMsg := err.Error()\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"at line 15, column 12\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include line and column\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"at field server.port\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include field path\")\n\t}\n}\n\n// TestValidationErrorWithoutFieldPath demonstrates ValidationError without field path\n//\n// Format: \"validation error in <file>: <message>\"\n//\n// Example output:\n//\n//\tvalidation error in config.yaml: validation failed\nfunc TestValidationErrorWithoutFieldPath(t *testing.T) {\n\terr := NewValidationError(\"config.yaml\", \"validation failed\", \"\", \"\", ErrCodeValidationFailed, 0, 0, \"\", \"config.yaml\")\n\n\texpected := \"validation error in config.yaml: validation failed\"\n\tif err.Error() != expected {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"Error() = %q, want %q\", err.Error(), expected)\n\t}\n\n\terrorMsg := err.Error()\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"validation error in\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include error type\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"validation failed\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include message\")\n\t}\n}\n\n// TestValidationErrorComplete demonstrates complete ValidationError with all components\n//\n// Format breakdown:\n// - Location: \"<file>:<line>:<column>\" or \"<file>\"\n// - Error type: \"validation error in\"\n// - Field path: \"at field <field-path>\"\n// - Message: The specific validation failure\n// - Constraint: \"(constraint: <details>)\"\n//\n// Example:\n//\n//\tvalidation error in deployment.yaml at line 22, column 18 at field spec.template.spec.containers[0].image: invalid image tag (constraint: must match registry/*:tag pattern)\nfunc TestValidationErrorComplete(t *testing.T) {\n\terr := NewValidationError(\"deployment.yaml\", \"invalid image tag\", \"spec.template.spec.containers[0].image\", \"must match registry/*:tag pattern\", ErrCodeInvalidValue, 22, 18, ErrorTypeValidation, \"spec.template.spec.containers[0].image\")\n\n\terrorMsg := err.Error()\n\n\t// Verify all components\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"deployment.yaml\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include file path\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"at line 22, column 18\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include line and column\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"at field spec.template.spec.containers[0].image\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include field path\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"invalid image tag\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include message\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"constraint: must match registry/*:tag pattern\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include constraint\")\n\t}\n}\n\n// ============================================================================\n// Section 3: Type mismatch errors\n// ============================================================================\n\n// TestTypeMismatchErrorFormat demonstrates type mismatch error format\n//\n// Format: \"type mismatch in <file> at line <line>, field <field-path>: expected <expected>, got <actual>\"\n//\n// Example output:\n//\n//\ttype mismatch in config.yaml at line 8, field server.port: expected integer, got string\nfunc TestTypeMismatchErrorFormat(t *testing.T) {\n\terr := NewTypeMismatchError(\n\t\t\"config.yaml\",\n\t\t\"server.port\",\n\t\t\"integer\",\n\t\t\"string\",\n\t\t\"8080\",\n\t\t8,\n\t\t\"\",\n\t)\n\n\texpected := \"type mismatch in config.yaml at line 8, field server.port: expected integer, got string\"\n\tif err.Error() != expected {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"Error() = %q, want %q\", err.Error(), expected)\n\t}\n\n\t// Verify format\n\terrorMsg := err.Error()\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"type mismatch in\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include error type\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"config.yaml\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include file path\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"at line 8\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include line number\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"field server.port\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include field path\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"expected integer\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include expected type\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"got string\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include actual type\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Verify Context() method\n\tctxMsg := err.Context()\n\texpectedCtx := \"field: server.port, expected type: integer, actual type: string, value: 8080\"\n\tif ctxMsg != expectedCtx {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"Context() = %q, want %q\", ctxMsg, expectedCtx)\n\t}\n}\n\n// TestTypeMismatchVariousTypes documents type mismatch errors for various type combinations\n//\n// Common type mismatches:\n// - Expected integer, got string\n// - Expected string, got integer\n// - Expected boolean, got string\n// - Expected array, got scalar\n// - Expected object, got null\nfunc TestTypeMismatchVariousTypes(t *testing.T) {\n\ttestCases := []struct {\n\t\tname         string\n\t\tfieldPath    string\n\t\texpectedType string\n\t\tactualType   string\n\t\tvalue        string\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:         \"integer expected, string got\",\n\t\t\tfieldPath:    \"port\",\n\t\t\texpectedType: \"integer\",\n\t\t\tactualType:   \"string\",\n\t\t\tvalue:        \"8080\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:         \"integer expected, boolean got\",\n\t\t\tfieldPath:    \"timeout\",\n\t\t\texpectedType: \"integer\",\n\t\t\tactualType:   \"boolean\",\n\t\t\tvalue:        \"true\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:         \"boolean expected, string got\",\n\t\t\tfieldPath:    \"enabled\",\n\t\t\texpectedType: \"boolean\",\n\t\t\tactualType:   \"string\",\n\t\t\tvalue:        \"yes\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:         \"array expected, string got\",\n\t\t\tfieldPath:    \"hosts\",\n\t\t\texpectedType: \"array\",\n\t\t\tactualType:   \"string\",\n\t\t\tvalue:        \"localhost\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:         \"object expected, null got\",\n\t\t\tfieldPath:    \"config\",\n\t\t\texpectedType: \"object\",\n\t\t\tactualType:   \"null\",\n\t\t\tvalue:        \"null\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\terr := &TypeMismatchError{\n\t\t\t\tFilePath:     \"config.yaml\",\n\t\t\t\tFieldPath:    tt.fieldPath,\n\t\t\t\tExpectedType: tt.expectedType,\n\t\t\t\tActualType:   tt.actualType,\n\t\t\t\tValue:        tt.value,\n\t\t\t\tLine:         10,\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\terrorMsg := err.Error()\n\n\t\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, tt.fieldPath) {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Should include field path '%s'\", tt.fieldPath)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, tt.expectedType) {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Should include expected type '%s'\", tt.expectedType)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, tt.actualType) {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Should include actual type '%s'\", tt.actualType)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Verify error type\n\t\t\tif err.YAMLErrorType() != ErrorTypeTypeMismatch {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"YAMLErrorType() = %q, want %q\", err.YAMLErrorType(), ErrorTypeTypeMismatch)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Verify error code\n\t\t\tif err.Code() != ErrCodeTypeMismatch {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Code() = %q, want %q\", err.Code(), ErrCodeTypeMismatch)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\n// TestTypeMismatchNestedFields demonstrates type mismatch in nested field paths\n//\n// Example:\n//\n//\ttype mismatch in app.yaml at line 35, field servers.api.responses[0].statusCode: expected integer, got string\nfunc TestTypeMismatchNestedFields(t *testing.T) {\n\terr := &TypeMismatchError{\n\t\tFilePath:     \"app.yaml\",\n\t\tFieldPath:    \"servers.api.responses[0].statusCode\",\n\t\tExpectedType: \"integer\",\n\t\tActualType:   \"string\",\n\t\tValue:        \"\\\"200\\\"\",\n\t\tLine:         35,\n\t}\n\n\terrorMsg := err.Error()\n\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"app.yaml\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include file path\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"at line 35\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include line number\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"field servers.api.responses[0].statusCode\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include nested field path\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"expected integer, got string\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include type information\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Verify context\n\tctxMsg := err.Context()\n\tif !contains(ctxMsg, \"field: servers.api.responses[0].statusCode\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Context should include field path\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(ctxMsg, \"expected type: integer\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Context should include expected type\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(ctxMsg, \"actual type: string\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Context should include actual type\")\n\t}\n}\n\n// TestTypeMismatchWithoutLine demonstrates type mismatch error without line number\n//\n// Format: \"type mismatch in <file>, field <field-path>: expected <expected>, got <actual>\"\n//\n// Example output:\n//\n//\ttype mismatch in data.yaml, field database.timeout: expected integer, got boolean\nfunc TestTypeMismatchWithoutLine(t *testing.T) {\n\terr := &TypeMismatchError{\n\t\tFilePath:     \"data.yaml\",\n\t\tFieldPath:    \"database.timeout\",\n\t\tExpectedType: \"integer\",\n\t\tActualType:   \"boolean\",\n\t\tValue:        \"true\",\n\t\tLine:         0,\n\t}\n\n\texpected := \"type mismatch in data.yaml, field database.timeout: expected integer, got boolean\"\n\tif err.Error() != expected {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"Error() = %q, want %q\", err.Error(), expected)\n\t}\n\n\terrorMsg := err.Error()\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"type mismatch in data.yaml\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include file path without line number\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"field database.timeout\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include field path\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"expected integer, got boolean\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include type information\")\n\t}\n}\n\n// ============================================================================\n// Section 4: Real-world error scenarios\n// ============================================================================\n\n// TestRealWorldConfigFileError demonstrates a realistic configuration file error scenario\n//\n// Scenario: Invalid port configuration in service config\n//\n// config.yaml:\n//\n//\tservices:\n//\t  - name: web\n//\t    port: \"8080\"  # ERROR: should be integer, not string\n//\n// Error output:\n//\n//\ttype mismatch in config.yaml at line 5, field services[0].port: expected integer, got string\nfunc TestRealWorldConfigFileError(t *testing.T) {\n\terr := &TypeMismatchError{\n\t\tFilePath:     \"config.yaml\",\n\t\tFieldPath:    \"services[0].port\",\n\t\tExpectedType: \"integer\",\n\t\tActualType:   \"string\",\n\t\tValue:        \"\\\"8080\\\"\",\n\t\tLine:         5,\n\t}\n\n\terrorMsg := err.Error()\n\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"config.yaml\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include file path\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"at line 5\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include line number\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"field services[0].port\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include field with array index\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"expected integer, got string\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include type mismatch\")\n\t}\n}\n\n// TestRealWorldValidationError demonstrates a realistic validation error scenario\n//\n// Scenario: Port number out of valid range\n//\n// config.yaml:\n//\n//\tserver:\n//\t  port: 70000  # ERROR: out of range (1-65535)\n//\n// Error output:\n//\n//\tconstraint violation in config.yaml at line 10, field server.port: must be between 1-65535\nfunc TestRealWorldValidationError(t *testing.T) {\n\terr := &ConstraintError{\n\t\tFilePath:       \"config.yaml\",\n\t\tFieldPath:      \"server.port\",\n\t\tConstraintType: \"range\",\n\t\tConstraint:     \"must be between 1-65535\",\n\t\tValue:          \"70000\",\n\t\tLine:           10,\n\t}\n\n\terrorMsg := err.Error()\n\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"config.yaml\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include file path\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"at line 10\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include line number\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"field server.port\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include field path\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"must be between 1-65535\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include constraint\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Verify context\n\tctxMsg := err.Context()\n\tif !contains(ctxMsg, \"field: server.port\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Context should include field path\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(ctxMsg, \"constraint: must be between 1-65535\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Context should include constraint\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(ctxMsg, \"value: 70000\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Context should include actual value\")\n\t}\n}\n\n// TestRealWorldFieldNotFoundError demonstrates a realistic missing field error scenario\n//\n// Scenario: Required field is missing\n//\n// config.yaml:\n//\n//\tdatabase:\n//\t  host: localhost\n//\t  # ERROR: missing required field 'port'\n//\n// Error output:\n//\n//\trequired field missing in config.yaml at line 8: database.port\nfunc TestRealWorldFieldNotFoundError(t *testing.T) {\n\terr := NewFieldNotFoundError(\"config.yaml\", \"database.port\", 8, \"\")\n\n\terrorMsg := err.Error()\n\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"required field missing\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include error type\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"config.yaml\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include file path\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"at line 8\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include line number\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"database.port\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include field path\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Verify context\n\tctxMsg := err.Context()\n\tif !contains(ctxMsg, \"required field not found: database.port\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Context should include field path\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Verify error type\n\tif err.YAMLErrorType() != ErrorTypeFieldNotFound {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"YAMLErrorType() = %q, want %q\", err.YAMLErrorType(), ErrorTypeFieldNotFound)\n\t}\n}\n\n// ============================================================================\n// Section 5: Error message format consistency\n// ============================================================================\n\n// TestErrorFormatConsistency verifies that error formats follow consistent patterns\n//\n// Consistency rules:\n// 1. File path always present if available\n// 2. Position (line, column) follows file path with \"at line <line>, column <column>\" format\n// 3. Field paths use \"at field <path>\" or \"field <path>:\" format\n// 4. Type mismatches use \"expected <expected>, got <actual>\" format\n// 5. Constraints use \"(constraint: <details>)\" or \"constraint: <details>\" format\nfunc TestErrorFormatConsistency(t *testing.T) {\n\t// Test ParseError format consistency\n\tparseErr := NewParseError(\"config.yaml\", \"test\", 10, 5, \"\", \"\", \"\")\n\tif !contains(parseErr.Error(), \"parse error in\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"ParseError should start with 'parse error in'\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(parseErr.Error(), \"at line 10, column 5\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"ParseError should include position with 'at line X, column Y'\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Test ValidationError format consistency\n\tvalidationErr := NewValidationError(\"config.yaml\", \"test\", \"server.port\", \"constraint\", \"\", 10, 5, \"\", \"server.port\")\n\tif !contains(validationErr.Error(), \"validation error in\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"ValidationError should start with 'validation error in'\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(validationErr.Error(), \"at field server.port\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"ValidationError should include 'at field <path>'\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Test TypeMismatchError format consistency\n\ttypeErr := &TypeMismatchError{\n\t\tFilePath:     \"config.yaml\",\n\t\tFieldPath:    \"server.port\",\n\t\tExpectedType: \"integer\",\n\t\tActualType:   \"string\",\n\t\tLine:         10,\n\t}\n\tif !contains(typeErr.Error(), \"type mismatch in\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"TypeMismatchError should start with 'type mismatch in'\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(typeErr.Error(), \"expected integer, got string\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"TypeMismatchError should use 'expected X, got Y' format\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Test ConstraintError format consistency\n\tconstraintErr := &ConstraintError{\n\t\tFilePath:       \"config.yaml\",\n\t\tFieldPath:      \"server.port\",\n\t\tConstraint:     \"must be between 1-65535\",\n\t\tLine:           10,\n\t}\n\tif !contains(constraintErr.Error(), \"constraint violation in\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"ConstraintError should start with 'constraint violation in'\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(constraintErr.Error(), \"must be between 1-65535\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"ConstraintError should include constraint\")\n\t}\n}\n\n// TestErrorContextFormat verifies that Context() methods provide structured information\nfunc TestErrorContextFormat(t *testing.T) {\n\t// Test TypeMismatchError Context()\n\ttypeErr := &TypeMismatchError{\n\t\tFieldPath:    \"server.port\",\n\t\tExpectedType: \"integer\",\n\t\tActualType:   \"string\",\n\t\tValue:        \"8080\",\n\t}\n\tctx := typeErr.Context()\n\tif !contains(ctx, \"field: server.port\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Context should include 'field: <path>'\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(ctx, \"expected type: integer\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Context should include 'expected type: <type>'\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(ctx, \"actual type: string\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Context should include 'actual type: <type>'\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(ctx, \"value: 8080\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Context should include 'value: <value>'\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Test ConstraintError Context()\n\tconstraintErr := &ConstraintError{\n\t\tFieldPath:  \"server.port\",\n\t\tConstraint: \"must be between 1-65535\",\n\t\tValue:      \"70000\",\n\t}\n\tctx = constraintErr.Context()\n\tif !contains(ctx, \"field: server.port\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Context should include 'field: <path>'\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(ctx, \"constraint: must be between 1-65535\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Context should include 'constraint: <constraint>'\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(ctx, \"value: 70000\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Context should include 'value: <value>'\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Test FieldNotFoundError Context()\n\tfieldErr := NewFieldNotFoundError(\"config.yaml\", \"database.host\", 5, \"\")\n\tctx = fieldErr.Context()\n\tif !contains(ctx, \"required field not found: database.host\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Context should include 'required field not found: <path>'\")\n\t}\n}\n\n// TestErrorRecognition verifies that error types are correctly recognized\nfunc TestErrorRecognition(t *testing.T) {\n\t// Test ParseError recognition\n\tparseErr := NewParseError(\"test.yaml\", \"test\", 1, 1, \"\", \"\", \"\")\n\tif !IsParseError(parseErr) {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should recognize ParseError\")\n\t}\n\tif !IsYAMLError(parseErr) {\n\t\tt.Error(\"ParseError should be a YAMLError\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Test ValidationError recognition\n\tvalidationErr := NewValidationError(\"test.yaml\", \"test\", \"field\", \"constraint\", \"\", 1, 1, \"\", \"field\")\n\tif !IsValidationError(validationErr) {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should recognize ValidationError\")\n\t}\n\tif !IsYAMLError(validationErr) {\n\t\tt.Error(\"ValidationError should be a YAMLError\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Test TypeMismatchError recognition\n\ttypeErr := &TypeMismatchError{FilePath: \"test.yaml\"}\n\tif !IsYAMLError(typeErr) {\n\t\tt.Error(\"TypeMismatchError should be a YAMLError\")\n\t}\n\tif typeErr.YAMLErrorType() != ErrorTypeTypeMismatch {\n\t\tt.Error(\"TypeMismatchError should have type TypeMismatch\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Test ConstraintError recognition\n\tconstraintErr := &ConstraintError{FilePath: \"test.yaml\"}\n\tif !IsYAMLError(constraintErr) {\n\t\tt.Error(\"ConstraintError should be a YAMLError\")\n\t}\n\tif constraintErr.YAMLErrorType() != ErrorTypeConstraint {\n\t\tt.Error(\"ConstraintError should have type Constraint\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Test FieldNotFoundError recognition\n\tfieldErr := NewFieldNotFoundError(\"test.yaml\", \"field\", 1, \"\")\n\tif !IsYAMLError(fieldErr) {\n\t\tt.Error(\"FieldNotFoundError should be a YAMLError\")\n\t}\n\tif fieldErr.YAMLErrorType() != ErrorTypeFieldNotFound {\n\t\tt.Error(\"FieldNotFoundError should have type FieldNotFound\")\n\t}\n}\n\n// TestErrorCodes verifies that error codes are properly set\nfunc TestErrorCodes(t *testing.T) {\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname         string\n\t\terr          YAMLError\n\t\twantCode     ErrorCode\n\t\twantType     ErrorType\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:     \"ParseError with invalid syntax\",\n\t\t\terr:      NewParseError(\"test.yaml\", \"test\", 1, 1, ErrCodeInvalidSyntax, \"\", \"\"),\n\t\t\twantCode: ErrCodeInvalidSyntax,\n\t\t\twantType: ErrorTypeParse,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:     \"ValidationError with invalid value\",\n\t\t\terr:      NewValidationError(\"test.yaml\", \"test\", \"field\", \"constraint\", ErrCodeInvalidValue, 1, 1, \"\", \"field\"),\n\t\t\twantCode: ErrCodeInvalidValue,\n\t\t\twantType: ErrorTypeValidation,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:
